title: Scriptor Community Mode
description: A datapack which enables Community Mode for Scriptor Magicae.
body:
# Scriptor Community Mode!

Join [my Discord](https://discord.com/invite/fzZZhbe4rr) to work with others and figure out the community dictionary!

Play with the wider Scriptor Magicae community! When community mode is enabled, all words generated will be the same in all worlds, servers, and versions. In addition, each world will only be able to access about 1/5th of the spells and words available in the mod, so sharing with others is important.

This pack also disables the give command for Ancient Tomes and Ancient Scraps, removes them from the Creative Mode menu, and disables Scriptor's debug commands, just to make it a bit more fun. 

Obviously, it's still very easy to cheat, but if you do, please don't spoil it for others. This is a fun puzzle for the community to solve together!

**Have fun!**
